title: Anime Loot
description: Anime Loot: Craft Loot Caches to pull a Collectable Head from a random Anime Character 150+ to collect
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/906dc184d2d97b1a708cec0ca79a7d5a9d07bc46.png)


Craftable Loot Caches - Open to receive a random Head from the collection.

**NOTICE:** If you would like this mod/datapack updated to the latest patch or an older one, please rech out to me via the discord.

There are 3x different Dimensional Caches each with 50 unique heads. 
you can craft two quality Loot Caches. The Basic requires an **Emerald** and the Rare Requires a **Diamond.** The Rare version has 5x higher odds of pulling a rare. 

You will then require a core which will select the dimensional loot cache required.
- **Gun Powder** for Overworld version
- **Blaze Powder** for Nether version
- **Ender Pearl** for the End Version

The final piece for the recipe is a piece of leather to bundle it together.

Below is an example of the Emerald Overworld Loot Cache

![Emerald Loot Cache](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/597d701f2609e513946e4e2dfffd09fcfd85c43b.png)

You can see all available heads in the gallery along with the recipes.

---

I don't have a dedicated Server for issues, but i do have an invite to my anime server where you can raise any issues should there be any.

Version 1.3 is the supported release
Supported Versions are Minecraft Version 1.26.1 and this will be updated to 1.26.2 when released.


**Acknowledgement**

I would like to acknowledge [@fishbowlforever](https://modrinth.com/user/fishbowlforever)
And the mod/data pack [Plushie Pods](https://modrinth.com/datapack/plushie-pods) for inspiring this datapack.

Also a special thanks to [@kanokarob](https://modrinth.com/user/kanokarob) who was very helpful on some of the practical applications and best processes and guidance helping me create this datapack.

I did not make all the Art in this pack myself, the custom Blocks are all Player heads that already exist inside of Minecraft thanks to all the Creators and Contributors on minecraft-heads.com.
